app.name: Choicepoint
app.one_sentence_promise: Captures your reasoning and prediction at the moment of a real decision, then reminds you to check whether you were right.
app.target_user: People making recurring, consequential personal or professional decisions who want to improve their judgment over time.
app.painful_moment: Making an important decision, forgetting the reasoning within weeks, and never learning if it was actually a good call.
app.why_different: A judgment-improvement tool, not a habit tracker: timestamped decision-and-prediction capture paired with a scheduled future revisit that surfaces your own past reasoning for calibration.
app.why_users_pay: Unlimited decisions tracked, calibration analytics (how often predictions were right), custom revisit schedules, export for professional reflection.
app.subscription_model: Free: 5 active decisions tracked. Paid: unlimited plus analytics and export.
app.local_first_mvp_scope: Fully on-device decision log with local-notification-based revisit prompts.
app.future_backend_roadmap: Optional cloud sync/backup; potential shared decision journals for co-founders or partners deciding together.
core_workflows: Log a decision (context, options, prediction, confidence)
Get reminded to revisit and record the actual outcome
ios_native_features: App Intents/Siri for quick decision capture
app.ar_ml_llm_fit: Optional on-device LLM to structure a rambling voice note into a clean decision record.
app.design_direction: Calm, restrained, ledger-like typography with no gamification or badges — feels serious and premium.
app.claude_design_prompt: Design a calm, ledger-inspired decision journal: a fast decision-capture form, a quiet upcoming-revisits list, and a restrained calibration-stats view with no game mechanics.
app.app_store_positioning: A journal for your decisions — not your habits. See if your judgment actually improves.
key_risks: Logging a decision in the moment must be fast or it won't happen
Low revisit completion would undermine the entire calibration promise
app.invalidation_criteria: If revisit completion stays low after onboarding tuning, drop the calibration claim and pivot to pure decision-logging.
app.v1_build_scope: Decision capture, revisit scheduling/notifications, outcome logging, basic calibration stats.
